//: Strict type-check for the public SDK boundary source (sdk.ts) only. This does NOT enable strict mode repo-wide. It compiles sdk.ts under strict:true so implicit-any and other boundary type regressions in the SDK entry point itself are caught. Internal modules imported by sdk.ts surface their own (out-of-scope) strict errors; the typecheck:sdk script filters to sdk.ts errors only, since those are the SDK-boundary defects this gate owns. Run via `npm run typecheck:sdk`.
